'''Jip Toorr''' was a [[Yevetha]]n [[Primate/Legends|primate]] of the warship [[Valorous (Victory-class)|''Devotion'']], formerly the ''Valorous'',<ref name="CSWE" /> during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].
